Documentation updates (lines 192-193) are conditional checks ('if it exists and documents query parameters'), not firm proposals. No files outside the expected scope are formally listed in the Files to Modify or Files to Create sections.

assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 99: 'Implement the license filter using apply_filter from common/src/db/query.rs' -- proposes direct reuse, not creation of new utilities. reuse-analysis.md line 120: 'No new utility functions or helper modules need to be created -- the existing codebase provides all the building blocks required for this feature.' reuse-analysis.md line 25: 'Reuse type: Direct invocation -- no modification to apply_filter is needed.'
